infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TapSafe needs your location to send emergency alerts with your current position.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TapSafe needs background location access to track your position during emergencies even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: TapSafe needs background location access to track your position during emergencies even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TapSafe uses the camera for silent video recording during emergencies.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TapSafe needs microphone access for voice trigger detection and emergency video recording.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: TapSafe needs access to your contacts to add emergency contacts quickly.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: TapSafe needs your location to send emergency alerts with your current position.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: TapSafe needs background location access to track your position during emergencies.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TapSafe needs your location to send emergency alerts with your current position.

plugins.microphonePermission: TapSafe needs microphone access for voice trigger detection and emergency recording.

plugins.cameraPermission: TapSafe uses the camera for silent video recording during emergencies.
plugins.microphonePermission: TapSafe needs microphone access for emergency video recording.

plugins.photosPermission: TapSafe saves emergency recordings to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: TapSafe saves emergency recordings to your photo library.

plugins.motionUsageDescription: TapSafe uses motion sensors for fall detection.
